message:
🌱 Add clickhouse: Add native Prometheus metrics endpoint mission (#988)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "clickhouse-7369-add-native-prometheus-metrics-endpoint",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "clickhouse: Add native Prometheus metrics endpoint",
+    "description": "Add native Prometheus metrics endpoint. Requested by 98+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ClickHouse setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ClickHouse version:\n```bash\nclickhouse-client --version\n```\nThis feature requires ClickHouse with native Prometheus support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review Prometheus metrics configuration",
+        "description": "ClickHouse added a native Prometheus metrics endpoint. Add this to your server configuration:\n```xml\n<prometheus>\n    <endpoint>/metrics</endpoint>\n    <port>9363</port>\n    <metrics>true</metrics>\n    <events>true</events>\n    <asynchronous_metrics>true</asynchronous_metrics>\n</prometheus>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Enable the Prometheus endpoint",
+        "description": "After updating the configuration, restart ClickHouse:\n```bash\nsudo systemctl restart clickhouse-server\n```\n\nTest the endpoint:\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:9363/metrics | head -20\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify Prometheus integration",
+        "description": "Confirm metrics are served in Prometheus format:\n```bash\ncurl -s http://localhost:9363/metrics | grep \"^ClickHouse\" | head -10\n```\nConfigure your Prometheus scrape target to point at this endpoint."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ClickHouse added a native Prometheus metrics endpoint configurable via server settings, serving metrics, events, and asynchronous metrics in Prometheus format.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "clickhouse",
+      "community",

+      "feature"
